segments.text: Welcome to the Fiddy Working Heritage Farm.
segments.translation: 欢迎来到Fiddy Working Heritage 农场。

segments.text: This open-air museum gives you the experience of agriculture and rural life in the English countryside at the end of the nineteenth century.
segments.translation: 这个露天博物馆会让你们体验到19世纪末英国乡村地区的农业和农村生活。

segments.text: So you'll see a typical farm of that period, and like me, all the staff are dressed in clothes of that time.
segments.translation: 你们还会看到那个时期典型的农场面貌，并且这里所有的员工都和我一样，穿着那个时代的衣服。

segments.text: I must give you some advice and safety tips before we go any further.
segments.translation: 在我们继续进入农场之前，我必须跟你们提一些建议以及说一些安全要点。

segments.text: As it's a working farm, please don't frighten or injure the animals.
segments.translation: 由于这个农场仍在运营中，所以请不要惊吓或者伤害这里的动物。

segments.text: We have a lot here, and many of them are breeds that are now quite rare.
segments.translation: 这里有很多动物，而且很多都是如今非常稀有的品种。

segments.text: And do stay at a safe distance from the tools: some of them have sharp points which can be pretty dangerous, so please don't touch them.
segments.translation: 还有，请一定要和农场工具保持安全距离，它们中有一些非常尖锐，会很危险的，所以请不要碰它们。

segments.text: We don't want any accidents, do we?
segments.translation: 我们可不想出现任何意外，对吧？

segments.text: The ground is very uneven, and you might slip if you're wearing sandals so I'm glad to see you're all wearing shoes - we always advise people to do that.
segments.translation: 这里的地面坑坑洼洼的，如果你们穿着凉鞋过来的话可能会摔倒。我很高兴看见你们都穿了鞋子过来，我们一般都建议大家这么做。

segments.text: Now, children of all ages are very welcome here, and usually even very young children love the ducks and lambs, so do bring them along next time you come.
segments.translation: 我们欢迎所有年龄段的孩子来参观，而且即使特别小的孩子通常也很喜欢这里的鸭子和小羊，所以下次你们过来的时候可以带他们一起过来。

segments.text: I don't think any of you have brought dogs with you, but in case you have, I'm afraid they'll have to stay in the car park, unless they're guide dogs.
segments.translation: 我想你们应该没人带了狗过来吧，不过以防有人带了我还是说一下吧，恐怕你们得把狗留在停车场了，除非它们是导盲犬。

segments.text: I'm sure you'll understand that they could cause a lot of problems on a farm.
segments.translation: 我相信你们一定会理解的，因为它们可能会在农场造成很多麻烦。

segments.text: Now let me give you some idea of the layout of the farm.
segments.translation: 现在我给你们介绍一下农场的布局。

segments.text: The building where you bought your tickets is the New Barn, immediately to your right, and we're now at the beginning of the main path to the farmland - and of course the car park is on your left.
segments.translation: 你们刚才买票的那栋楼是New Barn，就在你们右边；现在我们在去农场的主道的入口处，还有，当然啦，停车场在你们左边。

segments.text: The scarecrow you can see in the car park in the corner, beside the main path, is a traditional figure for keeping the birds away from crops, but our scarecrow is a permanent sculpture.
segments.translation: 你们在停车场看见的那个放在主干道旁边角落里的稻草人，是个防止鸟儿靠近庄稼的传统特色，不过我们的稻草人是个固定的雕塑。

segments.text: It's taller than a human being, so you can see it from quite a distance.
segments.translation: 它比真人还要高，所以你们从很远的地方就能看见它。

segments.text: If you look ahead of you, you'll see a maze.
segments.translation: 往前看的话会看到一个迷宫。

segments.text: It's opposite the New Barn, beside the side path that branches off to the right just over there.
segments.translation: 就在New Barn对面，那里右边的分岔路旁边。

segments.text: The maze is made out of hedges which are too tall for young children to see over them, but it's quite small, so you can't get lost in it!
segments.translation: 围着这个迷宫的树篱比较高，小孩子是没法儿通过篱笆从上往下看的，不过它实际上只是个小迷宫，在里面不会走丢的。

segments.text: Now, can you see the bridge crossing the fish pool further up the main path?
segments.translation: 你们能看见主干道远处那个鱼塘上面的桥吗？

segments.text: If you want to go to the café, go towards the bridge and turn right just before it.
segments.translation: 如果你们想去餐厅的话，就朝着那座桥走，在桥前面右转。

segments.text: Walk along the side path and the café's on the first bend you come to.
segments.translation: 沿着分岔路一直走，餐厅就在你们看到的第一个拐弯的地方。

segments.text: The building was originally the schoolhouse, and it's well over a hundred years old.
segments.translation: 那栋建筑原本是个校舍，现在已经屹立在那儿一百多年了。

segments.text: As you may know, we run skills workshops here, where you can learn traditional crafts like woodwork and basket-making.
segments.translation: 你们也许知道，我们这儿还开了个技能学习班，在这里可以学到像木工和编篮子这样的传统手工技能。

segments.text: You can see examples of the work, and talk to someone about the courses, in the Black Barn.
segments.translation: 你们可以去Black Barn看看样品，找相关人员聊聊这些课程。

segments.text: If you take the side path to the right, here, just by the New Barn, you'll come to the Black Barn just where the path first bends.
segments.translation: 从New Barn右边的这条岔路一直走，在第一个拐弯的地方就能找到Black Barn。

segments.text: Now I mustn't forget to tell you about picnicking, as I can see some of you have brought your lunch with you.
segments.translation: 现在我要跟你们说一下野餐的事情，因为我看见你们有些人已经带了午餐过来。

segments.text: You can picnic in the field, though do clear up behind you, of course.
segments.translation: 你们可以在田里野餐，不过记得吃完要收拾干净。

segments.text: Or if you'd prefer a covered picnic area, there's one near the farmyard: just after you cross the bridge, there's a covered picnic spot on the right.
segments.translation: 或者，如果你们不喜欢露天用餐的话，可以去农场院子附近，过了桥就能看见右边有个带屋顶的野餐场所。

segments.text: And the last thing to mention is Fiddy House itself.
segments.translation: 最后要提的一个地方就是Fiddy House。

segments.text: From here you can cross the bridge then walk along the footpath through the field to the left of the farmyard.
segments.translation: 你们可以从这里过桥，然后沿着步行小径一直走，穿过田野之后，走到农场院子左边。

segments.text: That goes to the house, and it'll give you a lovely view of it.
segments.translation: 这么走就能到达Fiddy House，而且一路上的风景也很漂亮。

segments.text: It's certainly worth a few photographs, but as it's a private home, I'm afraid you can't go inside.
segments.translation: 这座房子绝对适合拍几张照片，不过由于这是私人住宅，你们不能进去参观。

segments.text: Right. Well, if you're all ready, we'll set off on our tour of the farm.
segments.translation: 好了。如果你们都准备好了，那我们就出发去参观农场吧。
